reviews.comment:
Los baños por dios...parecen de cancha ..suciedad de excremento humano ...bichos muertos por todos lados..mugre mugre y mas mugre en medio de la pandemia. Se nota que no controla nadie esa estacion de servicio. Una pena..

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms, for God's sake... they look like they're from a football field... filthy with human excrement... dead bugs everywhere... filth, filth, and more filth in the middle of a pandemic. It's obvious no one is monitoring that gas station. What a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5bW9xdnlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Amplio espacio para descansar, mucho verde aunque bastante basura en el pasto.
Además en el área de compras no tenían la opción de pago QR de su propia aplicación Ypf ni de Mercado Pago, nunca visto. La respuesta a la consulta fue...estamos un poco desactualizados.

(Translated by Google)
Ample space to relax, lots of greenery, although quite a bit of litter on the grass.
Also, in the shopping area, they didn't offer QR code payment options from their own YPF app or Mercado Pago, which I've never seen before. The response to the inquiry was...we're a bit out of date.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5d28zNkxnEAE
